mapper.select: SELECT `id` AS id, `user_id` AS userId, `type` AS type, `change` AS `change`, `order_id` AS orderId, `description` AS description, `expire_date` AS expireDate, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`point` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `type` = 'EARN' ORDER BY `createdAt` DESC

SELECT `id` AS id, `user_id` AS userId, `type` AS type, `change` AS `change`, `order_id` AS orderId, `description` AS description, `expire_date` AS expireDate, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`point` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `type` = 'USE' ORDER BY `createdAt` DESC
